[uBlock Origin 1.0]
! Title: US Politics — Tier 2
! Description: Filters US political and current-events noise
! Expires: 4 days
! Generated by scripts/generate.py — DO NOT EDIT.
! Edit words/us.yml, then: uv run python scripts/generate.py

! --- Reddit: Figures & Parties ---
! High-profile individuals
reddit.com##article:has-text(/\b(?:Sanders)\b/i)

! --- Reddit: Labels & Ideology ---
! Partisan and ideological labels
reddit.com##article:has-text(/\b(?:Woke|DEI|Pronouns|Fascism|Nazi|Left[- ]?wing|Right[- ]?wing|Centrist|Communis(?:m|t)|Capitalis(?:m|t))\b/i)

! --- Reddit: Institutions — Government & Law ---
! Branches of government and legal entities
reddit.com##article:has-text(/\b(?:ICE|Federal|Judge|Fiscal|Bankruptcy|Tariff|Union|Strikes?|Vote|Election|shutdown|indictment)\b/i)

! --- Reddit: Tech & Billionaires ---
! Figures and companies dominating political/social discourse
reddit.com##article:has-text(/\b(?:Elon|Musk|Cybertruck|Tesla|Zuck(?:erberg)?|Palantir|Big\ Tech|Oligarch)\b/i)

! --- Reddit: AI News ---
! AI hype and product/news noise
reddit.com##article:has-text(/\b(?:Altman|Open ?AI|ChatGPT|anthropic|Gemini|Grok|Copilot|Nvidia|AGI|LLM|deepfake)\b/i)

! --- Reddit: Geopolitics & Conflict ---
! International relations and war-related terms
reddit.com##article:has-text(/\b(?:Drone|Nuclear|China|Taiwan|North\ Korea|ceasefire|genocide|airstrike|slava\ ukraini|Jew|Jews|Muslim|Zionis(?:m|ts?)|Anti-?[Zz]ionis(?:m|ts?))\b/i)

! --- Reddit: Social Issues & Controversy ---
! High-controversy social topics
reddit.com##article:has-text(/\b(?:Racis(?:m|t)|Homophobic|Immigrant|Defund|Corruption|Protests?|Epstein|abortion|shooting|mass\ shooting|deportation|insurrection)\b/i)

! --- Reddit: Economy & Cost of Living ---
! Economic-anxiety and cost-of-living noise
reddit.com##article:has-text(/\b(?:inflation|recession)\b/i)
